Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Makiel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel is a being who focuses on the bigger picture rather than mortal problems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Makiel is someone Suriel considers in her planning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Makiel is the First Judge of the Abidan Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Makiel may have planned for Suriel to face the reality of the situation by dirtying her hands.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Makiel expects Suriel to search for Ozriel.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Makiel is known as the Hound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Makiel is Judge designation zero-zero-one.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel created the Oversight system by binding fragments from the void with his will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel manipulates the Way to enforce natural laws at Oversight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel's Presence manifests as eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel uses white-gauntleted hands to transmit messages via celestial lenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel has dark brown skin and silver-streaked black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel's eyes blaze a bright violet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel is a member of the Court.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel is a designation of influence detected in the report.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — Makiel has influence on the fate of Cradle.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel can create planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Makiel's Presence can guide his own power without conscious intervention.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Makiel is viewing the past through a celestial lens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Makiel forged twelve prototype scythes that the Angler stole.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Makiel released a celestial lens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Makiel projected a map of Abidan territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — Makiel is the Mad King.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Makiel's alterations speed Cradle's destiny.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel wears seamless white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel wields the Sword of Makiel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword of Makiel is a massive two-handed blade that was used to pass capital punishment on the first generation of Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel wields the Sword of the First Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel's skin is dark and weathered by his mortal life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel is a Judge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel can produce ghostly projections of his sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel can blast the Mad King out of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Makiel swung a massive sword two-handed.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel cannot leave her Iteration until Makiel is restored.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — No two Judges can fight the Mad King without Makiel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Mad King intends to isolate Sector Eleven and then move in for the kill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Makiel urged that Ozmanthus be executed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Makiel admitted the utility of Ozriel’s Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Makiel manages Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Makiel can watch futures and trace threads of causality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Makiel looked over others coldly and demanded surrender.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Makiel scanned the future and found a specific course of action acceptable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ozriel had meetings with Makiel that became openly hostile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Makiel is a Judge who can match Ozriel in open combat.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Makiel placed seals on the Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel kept Suriel under close observation after Ozriel's disappearance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Makiel is one of the entities that helped erase Daruman in a vision of the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Makiel is an Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Makiel possesses a Mantle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Makiel watches the battle between Suriel and the Mad King in Fate.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel feels anger toward Makiel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel observes engagements from the back of his mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel rules over stretches of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel's goal is to kill Daruman and Ozriel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel possesses a Presence that acts as an eye floating over his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel admits to creating the Scythes that were stolen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel intends to give up the Mantle of the Hound if he survives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 22''' — Makiel wields the Reaper's Scythe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Makiel has restoration skills.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Makiel is a Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Makiel's real name is Tommess.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Makiel performed a transference ritual to transfer his life.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Makiel was the Hound and leader of the First Division, and was a Judge skilled with all seven disciplines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Court needs to find a new Makiel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Makiel named a successor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Makiel accuses Ozriel of dereliction of duty and violating the Eledari Pact.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
